zh.lifeSummary: Robert Parker於1564年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾爾德頓。他於大約1591年9月23日與Dorothy Stevens在英國維爾爾帕特尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1594年被列為held the vicarage of stanton st bernard。他去世於1614年在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德多斯包格享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Parker于1564年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾爾德頓。他于大约1591年9月23日与Dorothy Stevens在英国維爾爾帕特尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1594年被列为held the vicarage of stanton st bernard。他去世于1614年在荷兰蓋爾德藍德多斯包格享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Parker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English parker ‘park-keeper’ (Old French parquier, parchier), an officer employed to look after deer and other game in a hunting park (see Park 1). This surname is also very common among African Americans. It has also been recorded since medieval times in Ireland.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish names.

variants.name: Parkman
meanings: occupational name from Middle English park ‘enclosure, game preserve, park’ (Old French parc) + man, sometimes for one living at or near such a place but probably more often denoting someone employed to look after after deer and other game in a hunting park; compare Parker .
occupational name denoting the servant (Middle English man) of someone called Park (see Park 2).

variants.name: Parkerson
meanings: English: from the occupational name Parker + patronymic -son.

variants.name: Parkey
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): dialect pronunciation of Parker . Parker has a long history in Macclesfield, Manchester, and Bridgnorth.

variants.name: Park
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Sang, Sung, Yong, Jung, Jong, Chan, Jae, Jin, Kwang, Kyung, Myung, Chong, Chang, Chung, Byung, Min, Moon, Chul, Hae, Jeong, Dae, Seong, Myong.

English and Scottish: from Middle English and Older Scots parc, parke, perk ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc), often referring to the grounds of a manor house or a deer park where the lord hunted. The name was probably synonymous with Parker , denoting an officer who looked after a park for the lord of the manor.
English and Scottish: from a medieval pet form of the personal name   Peter  . Compare   Parkin  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.description: William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
The Dutch declared their independence from Spain.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."
Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.
"English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."

en.lifeSummary: Robert Parker was born in 1564, in Cholderton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Dorothy Stevens about 23 September 1591, in Patney, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1594, his occupation is listed as held the vicarage of stanton st bernard. He died in 1614, in Doesburg, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Parker est né en 1564, à Cholderton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Dorothy Stevens environ 23 septembre 1591, à Patney, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1594, sa profession de son indiquée est held the vicarage of stanton st bernard. Il est décédé en 1614, à Doesburg, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Parker wurde 1564 in Cholderton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 23. September 1591 in Patney, Wiltshire, England Dorothy Stevens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1594 ist sein Beruf als held the vicarage of stanton st bernard aufgeführt. Er starb 1614 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Doesburg, Geldern, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Parker è nato il nel 1564 nel Cholderton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Dorothy Stevens circa 23 settembre 1591, nel Patney, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1594, la sua occupazione è indicata come held the vicarage of stanton st bernard. Morì nel 1614, nel Doesburg, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Parkerは1564年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアチオルデルトンで生まれた。約1591年9月23日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアプアトニーでDorothy Stevensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1594年，職業はheld the vicarage of stanton st bernardと記録されている。彼は1614年にオランダジェルダーランドドエスブルグで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Parker(은)는 1564년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 컬더턴에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1591년 9월 23일 영국 윌츠히르 패트니에서 Dorothy Stevens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1594년, 그의 직업은 held the vicarage of stanton st bernard이었다. 그는 1614년 네덜란드 글델랜드 도스버그에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Parker nasceu em 1564, em Cholderton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Stevens aproximadamente 23 de setembro de 1591, em Patney, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1594, sua profissão aparece como held the vicarage of stanton st bernard. Ele faleceu em 1614, em Doesburg, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Parker родился в 1564 г. в местности чолдиртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Stevens около 23 сентября 1591 г. в местности патни, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1594 году он работал по профессии held the vicarage of stanton st bernard. Он умер в 1614 г. в местности доесбург, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 50 лет.

Murió en 1614, en Doesburg, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 50 años.
